Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Event Log: extract the traces sequences of activities per case - Case 1 RA VF AE RMI VF AD SC AC - Case 2 RA VF AE AD SC AC - Case 3 RA VF AE RMI RMI VF AD SC AC Observations All cases start with RA VF AE After AE choice either go directly to AD or go to RMI If RMI happens it can happen multiple times After RMI it goes back to VF

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Generalize the structure from traces main flow RA VF AE then optional repeating loop for RMI and VF then AD SC AC

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Propose loop as * ( RMI VF ) since * ( A B ) means A executed then exit or B then A again fits rework loop between RMI and VF

Name: Deductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Verify traces with model Case 2 skips loop AE AD Case 1 RMI VF AD Case 3 RMI RMI VF slight mismatch but captures intent

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: Rethink loop definition multiple times consider * ( RMI VF ) vs * ( -> ( RMI VF ) ) stick to prompt definition * ( A B )

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Final structure -> ( RA -> ( VF -> ( AE -> ( * ( RMI VF ) AD -> ( SC AC ) ) ) ) ) checks fitness for cases balances simplicity precision

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Model uses sequence and loop operators no XOR needed as choice implicit in loop no parallel observed
